name: Number 5: Doom Chimera Dragon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>５ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>亡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>朧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> デス・キマイラ・ドラゴン
name_jp_rom: Nanbāzu Go Mōrōryū Desu Kimaira Doragon
name_jp_tl: Numbers 5: Perishing-Gloom Dragon - Death Chimaera Dragon
desc:
2+ Level 5 monsters
Gains 1000 ATK for each material attached to it. This card with material can attack all monsters your opponent controls once each. At the end of the Battle Phase, if this card battled: You can activate one of the following effects.
● Target 1 monster in your GY; attach it to this card as material.
● Target 1 card in your opponent's GY; place it on top of their Deck.

action: Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
